mapper.select: select policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where 1=1 and version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where policy_id = a.policy_id) order by policy_id desc

select policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where 1=1 and policy_id = #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by cast(version as INTEGER) desc
select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where policy_id = #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piipolicy (policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{del_deadline, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archive_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NULLIF(#{arc_del_deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR},''), #{arc_del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{related_law, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{upddate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_piipolicy (policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policy_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{del_deadline, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archive_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NULLIF(#{arc_del_deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR},''), #{arc_del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{related_law, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), str_to_date(#{upddate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where policy_id = #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and phase= 'CHECKIN' and status= 'ACTIVE' and version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where policy_id = a.policy_id and phase= 'CHECKIN' and status= 'ACTIVE')
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where policy_id = #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piipolicy set policy_name= #{policy_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, del_deadline= #{del_deadline, jdbcType=INTEGER}, del_deadline_unit= #{del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, archive_flag= #{archive_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, arc_del_deadline= NULLIF(#{arc_del_deadline, jdbcType=VARCHAR},''), arc_del_deadline_unit= #{arc_del_deadline_unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, related_law= #{related_law, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comments= #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= NOW(), upduserid= #{upduserid} where policy_id = #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid from ( select policy_id, policy_name, version, phase, status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where 1=1 and version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where policy_id = a.policy_id) order by policy_id ) f where 1=1
order by policy_id limit #{offset}, #{amount}
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy a where 1=1 and version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where policy_id = a.policy_id)
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piipolicy select policy_id, policy_name, cast(version as INTEGER)+1, 'CHECKOUT', status, del_deadline, del_deadline_unit, archive_flag, arc_del_deadline, arc_del_deadline_unit, related_law, comments, regdate, NOW() as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piipolicy where policy_id = #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piipolicy set phase= 'APPROVING', upddate= NOW() where policy_id = #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piipolicy set phase= 'CHECKOUT', upddate= NOW() where policy_id= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piipolicy set phase= 'CHECKIN', upddate= NOW() where policy_id= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piipolicy set status= 'OLD', phase= 'CHECKIN', upddate= NOW() where policy_id= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version != #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
